Definition: Transcription of spoken words or lyrics of song playing over post
Text overlayed on screen of post
Summary of what's happening in the post
Relevant eating disorder psychopathology items based on the Eating Disorder Examination (EDE) subscales
Relevant eating disorder psychopathology items based on diagnostic features described in the Eating Disorder Examination (EDE)
A description of the post's audio
The tempo of the posts' audio (in BPM), calculated using librosa
A heuristic measure of emotional positivity or pleasantness of the music (0 = negative/sad, 1 = positive/happy)
A heuristic measure of energy, intensity, or emotional activation of the music (0 = calm/low-energy, 1 = energetic/high-intensity)
Proportion of harmonic sound vs. percussive sound (higher values = more melodic; lower values = less melodic)
